Why Work at GlobalLogic?

Our open work environment and global network of technology experts give you the freedom and resources to be truly innovative, whether you're designing a user interface for the next big app or developing embedded software for a life-saving medical device. What Future Do You Want?

Google

10001+ employees · Greater Bengaluru Area

Our culture

We’re building a company where people of different views, backgrounds and experiences can do their best work and show up for one another. A place where every Googler feels like they belong. #TeamAmex in Bengaluru

Our vibrant new Bengaluru City office is designed to support the collaborative ways our colleagues work with one another. In this office, you'll find our Finance, FinTech, Risk & Analytics, and Tech teams. Whether colleagues are working onsite or in a hybrid model (combination of virtual and in-office days), we do our best to ensure that they have the flexibility they need to develop personally and professionally.

Tata Consultancy Services

10001+ employees · Greater Bengaluru Area

238 connections work here

With You For the Long Run

At TCS, we have been pushing boundaries since 1968 - partnering with clients through every tech cycle, from mainframes to AI. Rooted in the Tata legacy, we carry forward its story of trust, quality and a sense of service to the community by building long-term relationships that thrive across decades. Our sponsorships of 14 global marathons reflect our spirit - whether in business or sport, TCS goes the distance with you. + Featured in the Top 50 global brands in 2025 by Kantar BrandZ + Ranked #1 IT service provider in Europe in 2025 by Whitelane Research + Named Global Top Employer across 30+ countries by Top Employers Institute

Thomson Reuters

10001+ employees · Greater Bengaluru Area

7 connections work here

Why join Thomson Reuters India?

Thomson Reuters is a leading provider of business information services.  We have offices in Hyderabad, Ahmedabad, Vadodra, Mumbai, Gurgaon, New Delhi and our new office in Bangalore with over 4,700+ employees.  We offer exciting opportunities for early careers & experienced professionals across Sales, Technology, Content, Customer Service, Finance, Strategy, and Journalism. At Thomson Reuters, we celebrate innovation, opportunities and talent development.

Shell

10001+ employees · Greater Bengaluru Area

Actively recruiting

Why choose Shell?

You can be a part of the future of energy. Together at Shell, we are transitioning to become a net-zero emissions business while providing the energy that people around the world need today. Working with experienced colleagues on this important challenge, you’ll have the opportunity to develop the skills you need to grow, in an environment where we value honesty, integrity and respect for one another. At Shell, you progress as we tackle the energy challenge together. #PowerYourProgress

Our commitment to building an inclusive workplace

FIS

FIS University Program: Maggie Awad at NYSE

This summer, the FIS University Program proudly sent one of our 2025 summer interns, Maggie Awad, to the exclusive NYSE NextGen Bootcamp at the New York Stock Exchange. Why join us

Join UST in Kerala, where career growth meets a vibrant work culture. Our teams solve real-world challenges for Fortune 500 clients, gaining both global exposure and hands-on experience with cutting-edge technologies. ​ Our campuses in Trivandrum and Kochi offer collaborative working spaces, innovation labs, team events, wellness initiatives, cultural celebrations, Family Day, and more – fostering a dynamic and inspiring work environment. ​ At UST, your work has the power to touch billions of lives. Innovate Today, Lead Tomorrow
